energy_drink.label: Energy drink
energy_drink.help: A cold energy drink from the cooler. A small instant lift, and for the next two hours the miles tire you more slowly. A new drink or meal replaces the old one; they do not stack.
energy_drink.purchased: You down the energy drink. You feel a little sharper, and the next couple of hours on the road will tire you more slowly.
energy_drink.worn_off: The energy drink has worn off.

diner_meal.label: Diner meal
diner_meal.help: A proper hot meal. Takes half an hour, eases fatigue right away, and for the next four hours the driving tires you more slowly. Counts as your 30-minute break.
diner_meal.purchased: You sit down to a hot meal and push the plate away satisfied. The next four hours of driving will tire you more slowly.
diner_meal.worn_off: That meal has worn off; the road is starting to drag again.

iron_skillet_dinner.label: Iron Skillet dinner
iron_skillet_dinner.help: The Iron Skillet is Petro's famous sit-down restaurant, and it beats any diner on the road: a big instant lift and five hours of slower fatigue. Takes 45 minutes, and counts as your 30-minute break.
iron_skillet_dinner.purchased: You take your time over a full Iron Skillet dinner. You feel genuinely restored, and the next five hours of driving will tire you more slowly.
iron_skillet_dinner.worn_off: The Iron Skillet dinner has worn off.

shower.label: Shower
shower.help: Pilot and Flying J are known for their showers -- and a fuel purchase here makes it free, just like real life. You come out fresh: an instant lift and three hours of slower fatigue.
shower.purchased: A hot shower and a clean shirt. You feel fresh, and the next few hours of driving will tire you more slowly.

big_bucks_brisket.label: Big Buck's smoked brisket plate
big_bucks_brisket.help: The best plate of food on any highway, and worth the trouble it takes to get a truck in here: the biggest instant lift in the game and six hours of slower fatigue.
big_bucks_brisket.purchased: The brisket lives up to every billboard. You feel like a new driver, and the next six hours on the road will barely touch you.
big_bucks_brisket.worn_off: The brisket glow has faded. Big Buck's is a long way back.

quick_lube.label: Quick lube and oil service
quick_lube.help: Speedco built its name on fast lube bays, and Love's runs them too. Fresh oil and a once-over: the engine wears a quarter slower for the rest of this trip. Over-revving and lugging still hurt it full price. Company drivers bill the carrier.
quick_lube.purchased: Fresh oil, new filters, and a clean bill of health. The engine will wear more slowly for the rest of this trip.

tire_rotation.label: Tire check and rotation
tire_rotation.help: The tire bay checks pressures and rotates the set. Evenly worn tires wear slower: a fifth less tread wear for the rest of this trip. Company drivers bill the carrier.
tire_rotation.purchased: Pressures set and tires rotated. The tread will wear more slowly for the rest of this trip.

diesel_additive.label: Premium diesel additive
diesel_additive.help: A bottle of fuel treatment in the tank. A small kindness to the engine: it wears a tenth slower for the rest of this trip. A lube-bay service does more where you can find one. Company drivers bill the carrier.
diesel_additive.purchased: You pour the additive in with the fuel. The engine will wear a little more slowly for the rest of this trip.
